title: Systems I've designed & shipped.
subtitle: A sample of the platforms, operators, and dashboards that moved real numbers in production.

items.name: DevOps Custom UI
items.summary: Internal DevOps control plane used across multiple verticals — RBAC, compliance, vendor VPN, AWS monitoring, asset management.
highlights: Roles-based authentication with fine-grained scopes.
Live AWS monitoring UI — EC2, RDS, ELB, and cost.
Approval workflow for infrastructure creation.
Full audit history for security groups and user actions.

items.name: PG2 Cloud Migration
items.summary: Lifted and re-platformed 50+ payment microservices from Ali Cloud to AWS on EKS with end-to-end CI/CD and monitoring.
highlights: Designed the target architecture on EKS with multi-AZ resiliency.
Built the end-to-end CI/CD pipeline for all PG2 services.
Comprehensive monitoring + alerting before the first customer was cut over.
Automated infrastructure provisioning via Terraform modules.

items.name: Scheduled HPA Operator
items.summary: Kubernetes Operator with a Custom Resource Definition that patches Horizontal Pod Autoscalers on business-day schedules.
highlights: Day-of-week schedule customization for fine-grained scaling.
Resource-name sorting for predictable ordering.
Structured logging for debugging and observability.
Zero-downtime rollouts via leader election.

items.name: AI SRE Copilot
items.summary: LLM-powered assistant that ingests alerts, correlates runbooks, and auto-executes safe remediations — with full Langfuse tracing.
highlights: Alert deduplication and root-cause hypothesis generation.
Retrieval over institutional runbooks and postmortems.
Safe-remediation playbooks gated by blast-radius scoring.
Eval harness for prompt regressions on historical incidents.

items.name: Business Metrics Dashboard
items.summary: Custom Grafana + Prometheus dashboard for business-critical metrics with automated alerting and incident workflows.
highlights: Business-facing KPIs alongside infra SLOs.
Automated alerts with context-rich payloads.
On-call playbooks linked directly from panels.

items.name: 2FA Firewall Integration
items.summary: Two-factor authentication bolted onto the vendor-access firewall — streamlined onboarding with strict role-based controls.
highlights: Role-based access for vendors with time-boxed permissions.
Streamlined onboarding flow with automated provisioning.
Full auditability of vendor sessions.
